chunks.outputPreview: Tech state is managed by `Unlocks` across four main categories: `mothership_unlocks`, `drone_unlocks`, `support_unlocks`, and `frigate_unlocks`. The primary files governing unlock state are `Globals/Unlocks.gd` (definitions and logic) and `classes/bases.gd` (upgrade mapping). Tech-tree UI and upgrade presentation are handled by `scenes/ui/upgrades/upgrade_canvas.gd`, `scenes/ui/upgrades/upgrade_table/Upgrade_Table.tscn`, and `tests/support/tutorial_ui_actions.gd`. Test and support helpers reside

The input contains extensive evidence of a unified unlock/research/upgrade system managed by the `Unlocks` singleton, categorized into `mothership_unlocks`, `drone_unlocks`, `support_unlocks`, and `frigate_unlocks`. The main files identified for this architecture are:

- **Unlock State**: `Unlocks.UNLOCK_MAP` (dictionary) and `Unlocks.TIER_UNLOCK_MAP` (for tier gating), accessed globally via `Unlocks.get_tech(category, key)`.
